name: XPLR Infrastructure, LP
summary: PART I XPLR, through its ownership in XPLR OpCo, has a partial ownership interest in a clean energy infrastructure portfolio in the U.S. with approximately 10 gigawatts of net generating capacity in 28 states as of December 31, 2025 and is one of the largest generators of energy from the wind and sun in the U.S. based on 2025 MWh produced on a net generation basis. XPLR's portfolio is diversified across generation technologies including wind, solar and battery storage projects. XPLR believes ant...
